'''βàödh-m-f-f''' ('''kadhamfefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ans|ans]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ans|ans]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàödh-m-f-f
|-
! Lemma
| kadhamfefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhamfefoko|thidhamfefoko]] || [[word:jidhamfefoko|jidhamfefoko]] || [[word:shidhamfefoko|shidhamfefoko]] || [[word:kidhamfefoko|kidhamfefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhamfefoko|thuthudhamfefoko]] || [[word:jujudhamfefoko|jujudhamfefoko]] || [[word:shushudhamfefoko|shushudhamfefoko]] || [[word:kukudhamfefoko|kukudhamfefoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhamfefoko|thedhamfefoko]] || [[word:jedhamfefoko|jedhamfefoko]] || [[word:shedhamfefoko|shedhamfefoko]] || [[word:kedhamfefoko|kedhamfefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhamfefoko|thodhamfefoko]] || [[word:jodhamfefoko|jodhamfefoko]] || [[word:shodhamfefoko|shodhamfefoko]] || [[word:kodhamfefoko|kodhamfefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhamfefoko|thodhamfefoko]] || [[word:jodhamfefoko|jodhamfefoko]] || [[word:shodhamfefoko|shodhamfefoko]] || [[word:kodhamfefoko|kodhamfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠdhamfefoko|thΟΠdhamfefoko]] || [[word:jΟΠdhamfefoko|jΟΠdhamfefoko]] || [[word:shΟΠdhamfefoko|shΟΠdhamfefoko]] || [[word:kΟΠdhamfefoko|kΟΠdhamfefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhamfefoko|thadhamfefoko]] || [[word:jadhamfefoko|jadhamfefoko]] || [[word:shadhamfefoko|shadhamfefoko]] || [[word:kadhamfefoko|kadhamfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhamfefoko|thadhamfefoko]] || [[word:jadhamfefoko|jadhamfefoko]] || [[word:shadhamfefoko|shadhamfefoko]] || [[word:kadhamfefoko|kadhamfefoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
